scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @sarmay/kaz-converter && npm run build --workspace @sarmay/kaz-converter-lm
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules .npm-cache packages/core/dist packages/lm/dist packages/core/node_modules packages/lm/node_modules
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @sarmay/kaz-converter && npm run test --workspace @sarmay/kaz-converter-lm
scripts.pack:dry: npm run build && npm pack --dry-run --cache .npm-cache --workspace @sarmay/kaz-converter && npm pack --dry-run --cache .npm-cache --workspace @sarmay/kaz-converter-lm
scripts.release:check: node scripts/validate-package-metadata.mjs && npm install --cache .npm-cache && npm run build && npm test && npm run pack:dry && npm whoami
scripts.publish:all: npm run publish:core && npm run publish:lm
